Motion To Compel Defendant Lucrecia Bermudez To Answer Deposition Questions And To Impose Sanctions On Her Attorney(S) For Instructing Her Not To Answer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities;
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Mila Logvin, Esq. (925.452.8232; Mila.Logvin@logvinlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
Austin Houvener, Esq. (510.835.3400; AHouvener@tcdlegal.com) of Toschi Collins Doyle for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF HENRY BURGOS' Motion To Compel Defendant Lucrecia Bermudez To Answer Deposition Questions And To Impose Sanctions On Her Attorney(S) For Instructing Her Not To Answer is DENIED. Both parties' requests for sanctions are DENIED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Sally Scharfe, CSR # 8439 (800.499.7866; office@apluscourtreporters.com). =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Defendant Lucrecia Bermudez To Answer Deposition Questions And To Impose Sanctions On Her Attorney(S) For Instructing Her Not To Answer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities;
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Continued To May-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The court received email re: counsel's availability for future hearing date.
The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HENRY BURGOS' Motion To Compel Defendant Lucrecia Bermudez To Answer Deposition Questions And To Impose Sanctions On Her Attorney(S) For Instructing Her Not To Answer is continued to May 5, 2022. The Court notes that it does not have the courtesy copy of moving/opposition/reply papers. Parties must provide a courtesy copy of all moving/opposition/reply papers to discovery302@sftc.org with copy to williamclynn@gmail.com no later than 4pm on April 13, 2022.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
